draft_prompts.experiment_designer: Design experiments to replicate the 5 major phases of the paper 'APT: Adaptive Pruning and Tuning Pretrained Language Models for Efficient Training and Inference', considering the available pre-trained models, datasets, and metrics.
draft_prompts.code_generator: Generate implementation code for the baselines and any additional components required for the experiment, considering the setup of LoRA.
draft_prompts.tester: Generate test cases to validate the implementation of the baselines and any additional components, ensuring that they meet the required metrics.
